description_long: This is a structured, modern snapback cap featuring a flat, wide yellow brim and a dark, textured crown with a subtle checkered pattern. The front panel displays a prominent 'Red Bull BC One' logo in white and yellow, with stylized bull graphics and bold lettering. The crown is constructed from multiple fabric panels, with a fabric-covered button at the top and visible stitching along the seams. The back of the cap has an open section typical of snapbacks, likely for size adjustment, and the interior is not visible but is likely lined with a soft fabric for comfort. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for streetwear or casual use. The color contrast between the yellow brim and the dark crown gives it a striking, fashionable appearance.
description: A modern snapback cap with a flat yellow brim, dark textured crown, and a prominent 'Red Bull BC One' logo on the front. The design is sporty and urban, with visible stitching and a structured shape.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open back section and textured dark fabric panels, with a fabric-covered button on top.
description_view_1: Side-rear angle highlighting the transition between the yellow brim and the dark crown, with visible seam lines.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the flat yellow brim and the large 'Red Bull BC One' logo on the crown's front panel.
description_view_3: Side-front angle showing the wide, flat yellow brim and the textured crown, with part of the logo visible.
